name: Pus Pockets
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
Slit open each pita along 1/4 of its edge to make a pocket.
Spoon 1/2 cup shredded cheese into each one.
Place the stuffed pitas on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until the pitas turn golden brown.
Remove from the oven.
Use a knife to poke a hole in the top of each pita.
Carefully squeeze each pita (they'll be hot) until a little melted cheese oozes out of the hole.
Dab ketchup around the hole and arrange on a platter.
